name: Crispy Taco Bites
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (3 oz ea.) cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray 2 Mini-Muffin Pans lightly with vegetable oil spray.
3. Separate won-ton wrappers and place one in each cup of the Mini-Muffin Pan.
4. Using a Mini-Tart Shaper, press each wrapper into the cup using care to keep the cup area open.
5. Combine all filling ingredients in a Batter Bowl.
6. Blend until smooth using a Super Scraper.
7. Fill won-ton cups with filling using a small Stainless Steel Scoop.
8. Bake for 10 minutes.
9. Chop toppings finely with a Food Chopper.
10. Garnish with toppings of choice.
Yield: 24 pieces
